Package i5.cb.api

Class CBNotificationConnection

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.api.CBclient
      • i5.cb.api.CBConnection
        • i5.cb.api.CBNotificationConnection
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ICBclient, java.rmi.Remote

    public class CBNotificationConnection
extends CBConnection
    A connection to a ConceptBase server via which the server sends notification messages to the client. This class now extends CBConnection, though strictly, a notification connection is not a regular connection. The reason is that we want to pose a query on this connection before view maintenance starts. Otherwise, we would have to open another connection, which would be unnecessarily expensive. There is never a timeout on a CBNotificationConnection. Maybe this is the only real difference to CBConnection.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class i5.cb.api.CBclient

        USE_LOCAL_CBCLIENT, USE_REMOTE_CBCLIENT, USE_REMOTE_CBCLIENT_IF_NEEDED

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      CBNotificationConnection​(CBConnectionData connectionData)
      opens a notification connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on connData.
      CBNotificationConnection​(java.lang.String sHostName, int iPortNo, java.lang.String sToolName, java.lang.String sUserName)
      opens a direct notification connection to a ConceptBase server.
      CBNotificationConnection​(java.lang.String sHostName, int iPortNo, java.lang.String sToolName, java.lang.String sUserName, int iUseCBclient, java.lang.String sRMIServerHostName, int iRMIServerPortNo)
      opens a notification connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on iUseCBclient.

    • Constructor Detail

      • CBNotificationConnection

        public CBNotificationConnection​(java.lang.String sHostName,
                                int iPortNo,
                                java.lang.String sToolName,
                                java.lang.String sUserName)
                         throws CBException
        opens a direct notification connection to a ConceptBase server. There is no timeout on this connection.
        Parameters:
        sHostName - name of the host where the server is running
        iPortNo - portno under which the server is running
        sToolName - name of the tool/client (optional)
        sUserName - name of the user who wants to connect (optional)
        Throws:
        CBException

      • CBNotificationConnection

        public CBNotificationConnection​(CBConnectionData connectionData)
                         throws CBException,
                                java.rmi.RemoteException,
                                java.net.MalformedURLException,
                                java.rmi.NotBoundException
        opens a notification connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on connData. There is no timeout on this connection.
        Throws:
        CBException
        java.rmi.RemoteException
        java.net.MalformedURLException
        java.rmi.NotBoundException
        See Also:
        CBConnectionData

      • CBNotificationConnection

        public CBNotificationConnection​(java.lang.String sHostName,
                                int iPortNo,
                                java.lang.String sToolName,
                                java.lang.String sUserName,
                                int iUseCBclient,
                                java.lang.String sRMIServerHostName,
                                int iRMIServerPortNo)
                         throws CBException,
                                java.rmi.RemoteException,
                                java.net.MalformedURLException,
                                java.rmi.NotBoundException
        opens a notification connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on iUseCBclient.
        Parameters:
        sHostName - name of the host running CBserver
        iPortNo - port number of the CBserver
        sToolName - tool name used for registering this client
        sUserName - user name for registering this client
        iUseCBclient - (see USE_xxx constants)
        sRMIServerHostName - hostname of the RMI server
        iRMIServerPortNo - portno of the RMI server. If == -1, the default portno (1099) is used.
        Throws:
        CBException
        java.rmi.RemoteException
        java.net.MalformedURLException
        java.rmi.NotBoundException

    • Method Detail

      • getNotificationMessageWithTimeOut

        public CBanswer getNotificationMessageWithTimeOut​(int iTimeOut)
                                           throws CBException,
                                                  java.io.IOException
        waits to receive a notification message. Blocks until a message is received or the timeout has been reached. May be placed in a loop, running in a separate thread.
        Returns:
        the notification message
        Throws:
        CBException
        java.io.IOException

      • getNotificationMessage

        public CBanswer getNotificationMessage​()
                                throws CBException,
                                       java.io.IOException
        waits to receive a notification message. Blocks until a message is received (no timeout, blocks infinitely long). May be placed in a loop, running in a separate thread.
        Returns:
        the notification message
        Throws:
        CBException
        java.io.IOException
